introduction: An abnormal narrowing or loss of distensibility of any part of the urethra, as a result of fibrosis. One of the commonest causes of urine retention in tropical Africa. Very rare in females and may result from trauma or inflammation; may be iatrogenic or congenital.

features: Examination of the external genitalia may reveal: Urethral indurations, Periurethral or perineal abscess, Urinary fistula

prevention: Ensure Prevention of sexually transmitted infections
Prompt and appropriate treatment of sexually transmitted infections
Care and attention to asepsis during instrumentation procedures involving the urethra
